name: pi-slop-review
description_en: Native diff review window for AI coding agents (pi, Claude Code, Codex CLI). Opens a Monaco-powered review UI in a Glimpse window so you can leave inline / file-level / overall comments on the agent's slop, then have the agent address each item. Adapted f
description_zh: AI 编码代理（pi、Claude Code、Codex CLI）的原生差异审查窗口。在 Glimpse 窗口中打开由 Monaco 驱动的审查 UI，以便在代理的代码草稿上添加内联/文件级/总体评论，然后让代理解决每个问题。改编自
